resignation_approve_date.text: วันที่อนุมัติ

as_dateofmeeting.text: วันที่ประชุม

as_commit_det.text: รายละเอียดการประชุม

as_begin_date.text: รับค่าหุ้นได้วันที่

as_bookno.text: เลขที่หนังสือ

root.sql:
SELECT sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no, sc_mem_m_ucf_prename.prename, sc_mem_m_membership_registered.member_name, sc_mem_m_membership_registered.member_surname, sc_mem_m_membership_registered.approve_date, sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group.member_group_name, sc_cnt_m_coop.coop_name, sc_cnt_m_coop.manager_name, sc_cnt_m_coop.address, sc_cnt_m_coop.tumbol_name, sc_cnt_m_coop.telephone_no, sc_cnt_m_coop.postcode, sc_cnt_m_coop.fax_no, sc_mem_m_ucf_province.province_name, sc_mem_m_ucf_district.district_name, pka_com_function.fp_get_thaidate(current_date , 'SD MONTH YYYY') as sysdate_tdate, PKA_COM_FUNCTION.fp_get_member_address_pres(sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no) as mem_address, '!as_bookno!' as as_bookno, '!as_board_group!' as as_board_group, '!as_timeofmeeting!' as as_timeofmeeting, '!as_dateofmeeting!' as as_dateofmeeting, '!as_guarantor!' as as_guarantor, '!manager_name_1!' as manager_name, '!position_name_1!' as position_name, '!as_commit_det!' as as_commit_det, '!as_begin_date!' as as_begin_date, sc_mem_m_membership_registered.resignation_approve_date
FROM sc_mem_m_membership_registered, sc_mem_m_ucf_prename, sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group, sc_cnt_m_coop, sc_mem_m_ucf_province, sc_mem_m_ucf_district
WHERE (( sc_mem_m_membership_registered.prename_code = sc_mem_m_ucf_prename.prename_code ) AND ( sc_mem_m_membership_registered.member_group_no = sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group.member_group_no ) AND sc_mem_m_ucf_province.province_code = sc_cnt_m_coop.province_code AND sc_mem_m_ucf_district.district_code = sc_cnt_m_coop.district_code AND sc_mem_m_ucf_district.province_code = sc_mem_m_ucf_province.province_code)
/*WHERE*/
